01 — ABOUT

Civil Engineer focused on reinforced concrete structural design — from analysis and member sizing to full detailing and construction drawing preparation. Currently working as a Site Engineer at the General Directorate of Buildings, Ministry of Urban Planning, with hands-on exposure to how designs are actually built.

Each project in this portfolio includes the governing design code, key structural parameters, and the actual construction drawings produced — columns, beams, slabs, and foundations.

  • Analysis & Design ETABS · SAFE · SAP2000
  • Drafting AutoCAD 2D
  • Codes ACI 318-19 · Saudi Code
  • Site Supervision & QA/QC
  • Quantities Take-off & Estimation
02 — PROJECT 01 · RESIDENTIAL VILLA
P-01 Residential Villa — RC Structural Design
Project TypeResidential Villa
RoleStructural Design
Footprint21.25 m × 14.20 m
FloorsGround + First + Second + Roof
Structural SystemRC Frame — Beams, Columns & Isolated Footings
Design CodeACI 318-19
Concrete Strengthf'c = 35 MPa
Reinforcement SteelHigh Tensile 400/600
Soil Bearing Capacity160 kN/m² @ -1.15 m
Foundation TypeIsolated Footings, t = 500 mm
NoteDesign exercise completed as part of Eng. Ahmed Elshahat's intensive structural design workshop (US & Saudi Codes)

Scope of Work

  • Structural layout & axis grid for ground, first, and roof levels
  • Column design & schedule (C1–C5) with stirrup detailing
  • Beam design for all slab levels, including hidden beams (HB)
  • Ground beam & rib reinforcement detailing
  • Isolated footing design & schedule (F1–F8, C.F1–C.F2)
  • Typical details: isolation joints, footing RFT, column sections
